name: langchain.llm
description: Python `langchain.llm` trace (raw text LLM, not a chat model). Input is `{prompts: string[], serialized: <llm config>, ...kwargs}` where the kwarg fields include `invocation_params`, `options`, `name`, `batch_size`, `metadata`. Output is an LLMResult: `{generations: Array<Array<Generation>>, llm_output, run}` where `generations[i]` is the list of completions for `prompts[i]` (so a single prompt with n=1 is `[[{text, generation_info}]]`).

prompts: What is the chemical symbol for sodium? Answer in one word.
